//===== Custom Script =========================================
//= EP Equipment Shop NPCs (EP1-13 to EP19)
//= 最粗的感動 private server
//===== Description ===========================================
//= 7 shop NPCs in north Prontera selling equipment by
//= Episode era. Helps players gear up for content quickly.
//=
//= 位置：prontera 北側，135,280 起，間隔 2 格
//= 格式：itemid:price（不是 price:itemid）
//= 驗證 ID：在遊戲內用 @ii <名稱> 查詢正確 item ID
//=============================================================

// EP1-13 Classic Equipment (10,000z each)
// Diabolus_Armor:2375  Diabolus_Manteau:2537  Diabolus_Boots:2433  Diabolus_Ring:2729
// Velum_Buster:1395  Velum_Glaive:1492  Velum_Claw:1832  Velum_Claymore:21001
// Main_Gauche:1208  Mace:1304  Spear:1403  Rod:1602  Composite_Bow:1704
